relations.evidence:
Product: Odoo
Title: Bank synchronization
relies on multiple third-party providers
It supports over 26,000 financial institutions worldwide
to automatically import all bank transactions
synchronizes directly with your bank institution
To use this service, a valid Odoo Enterprise subscription is required.
accounting/bank-synchronization
accounting/bank-synchronization/first-synchronization
accounting/
To synchronize the database with a bank, go to the Accounting Dashboard, click New, and select the Bank card. In the Add a Bank Account window
Alternatively, click the fa-ellipsis-v (vertical ellipsis) icon of the Bank journal, and Connect bank, or click Search over 26000 banks in the Accounting dashboard.
Fill in the Account Number, Bank, and SWIFT Code, and click Connect.
Fill in the Account Number, Bank, and SWIFT Code, and click Connect.
To limit the retrieval period, go to Accounting --> Accounting --> Lock Dates
and set a date in the Lock Everything field.
To view all past synchronizations, activate the developer mode and go to Accounting --> Configuration --> Online Synchronization.
To manually trigger synchronization, go to the Accounting dashboard and click Fetch Transactions on the relevant bank journal.
Alternatively, activate the developer mode, go to Accounting --> Configuration --> Online Synchronization, select the relevant bank, and click Fetch transactions.
To manually trigger synchronization, go to the Accounting dashboard and click Fetch Transactions on the relevant bank journal.
To manually trigger synchronization, go to the Accounting dashboard and click Fetch Transactions on the relevant bank journal.
In such cases, disable the Automatic synchronization option in the corresponding bank's Online Synchronization.
To manually trigger synchronization, go to the Accounting dashboard and click Fetch Transactions on the relevant bank journal.
Accounting --> Configuration
go to Accounting --> Configuration --> Online Synchronization
To update bank credentials, activate the developer mode
The steps may vary depending on the third-party provider

heading: Why is the synchronization not working in real-time?

relations.evidence: go to the Accounting Dashboard
go to the Accounting Dashboard, and click Fetch Transactions
activate the developer mode and go to Accounting --> Configuration --> Online Synchronization
third-party providers synchronize accounts
retrieve bank transactions
only transactions with a Posted status are retrieved
Transactions may appear on a bank account, but cannot be fetched if they have a Pending status; only transactions with a Posted status are retrieved

cannot retrieve transactions until the security code is provided

heading: Why is there an error when deleting a synchronization in Odoo?

relations.evidence: Odoo can't permanently delete the connection established with the banking institution
which prevents Odoo from accessing the account
revokes consent
The error message indicates that the consent has been revoked
but the record could not be deleted
it remains in Salt Edge
To delete the connection, connect to the Salt Edge account
and manually remove the synchronization

heading: I have an error saying that this account has already been synchronized
